claimText: Violations of GenAI guidelines such as use of unauthorised aids or non-disclosure of their use are subject to disciplinary action under existing performance assessment rules and the declaration of originality.

citation.citationTitle: Generative AI in Teaching and Learning — Guidelines (ETH Zurich)
